song.title: Nearer each Day to Me
song.lyrics: [v1] Nearer each day to me Dearer each day to me This Person inside of me Is becoming reality Saving me, loving me, Faith and hope giving me, You’re all the world to me Jesus my Lord [v2] Even when faith is small, When there’s no hope at all. I hear Him say to me, Trust in Me and you’ll see That I’ll supply all your needs If only you’ll believe All anxious doubts will cease While trusting in me.
